subcodes.title: Words to Mr Chant, Fugeta, et al, spoken on 1919-12-26
subcodes.first_line: Do you like Haifa by this time?... Look at the spiritual side of Haifa, not the material side... The title of 'Bahá'u'lláh' was given by Himself.
subcodes.subjects: @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @youth and pre-ministry of Abdu'l-Baha, @Baha'u'llah
